summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of AUMRYX CrowdSafe - Braj Holi 2026 safety platform. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend fully functional with bilingual support, OpenStreetMap integration, emergency features, and traditional Indian theme.
passed_tests: All 18 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with live status ticker, safety indicator, alerts, and quick actions
Language toggle switches between English and Hindi for all content
Schedule page shows all seeded Braj Holi 2026 events in timeline format
Live Map page shows OpenStreetMap with crowd status markers and layer controls
Emergency page has working call buttons for Police (100), Ambulance (102), Fire (101)
Emergency page has Share Location functionality
Visitor Guide page displays travel information sections
Safe Routes page shows route suggestions based on crowd status
Lost & Found page allows submitting and viewing reports
Help Near Me page displays nearby help locations with distance calculation
Alerts page shows official alerts
FAQ page with expandable questions
Do's and Don'ts safety guidelines page
SOS floating button on all pages (except admin/emergency)
Admin page shows login prompt for unauthenticated users with Google Auth
Traditional Indian saffron/orange theme properly implemented
Bilingual EN/HI support throughout the application
OpenStreetMap/Leaflet integration working with crowd markers
Pre-populated Braj Holi 2026 events data (9 events, 6 highlights)
Safety status data for 5 locations with crowd levels
Help locations data for 7 locations (police, hospital, fire, water, toilet, parking)
Emergency SOS logging functionality
Lost & Found report creation and viewing
All API endpoints: /api/events, /api/safety-status, /api/alerts, /api/help-locations, /api/lost-found
